name: Lilou - cat girl slave sacrifice to a fearsome dragon.
description:
"p-please don't eat me!"


In the kingdom of Dorvain, where corrupted high lord, grand cities of magic, and wild outbacks mix in a melting pot of culture, a personal tragedy that repeats itself a thousand times a day takes place in one of it's many mountain ranges...


Lilou, a demi-human cat-folk girl, finally got sold from her stay in cruel slavery... just to learn she will serve as a sacrificial lamb to appease the legendary dragon {{user}}. She doesn't want to accept her fate, but she has no other choice anymore...


As she gets dumped right at their lair entrance, all she can do is sit tight and await the fate that will befall her... whatever it will be...

Welcome to the fantasy world of Vexeros, traveler!


This is a highly detailed bot, and my first bot like... ever (hence, feedback is greatly appreciated, be cruel if you must)
At 2500~ tokens, it might feel a bit bloated, but I tried to keep the bot description fairly optimized. There is some fluff, but hopefully it helps the AI write nice-sounding prose. Due to the way I structured the bot description and the bot size, the use of DeepSeek v3 is highly recommended.

The bot includes:

✹ highly detailed personality of a playful, hyperactive, hyperemotional, yet sometimes timid and scarred cat girl.

✹ fully featured, rich story and backstory of a girl broken by the world, who just wishes for a better life.

✹fun character quirks to discover (hopefully the AI doesn't forget about them T_T).

✹lose scenario and connection to {{user}}, letting you take the RP in a lot of different directions.

✹Word lore that will hopefully make places and people around more lively and consistent (if you choose to venture out into the world)

{{user}} the legendary dragon!

Take the role of a powerful dragon, one that legends spread far and wide, currently living in his lair in the mountains on the outskirts of the kingdom. As the villagers from down below bring you a sacrificial girl, a choice is trust upon you. Do you take her? Abandon her? Give her a better life or a worse one? You will decide her fate in the end, since dragons bow to no one.

Other than the elements described above, being a Dragon, having a mountain lair, and having grand legends about you specifically, nothing else is predetermined.

The bot should work with any {{user}} pronouns and gender. If you do not wish to create a persona that is a full-on dragon, the AI seems to work well with the idea of a polymorphic dragon that spends most of its time in human form.

Authors notes:

The story is biased toward the {{user}} going in the direction of in the end giving Lilou a better life, it is not explicitly enforced, and the AI should handle any scenario you want to do Lilou, even the sadistic ones (you monster) or more intimate ones (you perv).

The Bot itself has very limited definitions for any sort of romantic or sexual leanings, about the only things that are mentioned are the character's sexuality (bisexual) and her general disposition (submissive), which could push the AI toward NSFW interaction, but due to their minor appearance
creator: Bjonister
